title: Pleurothallis amesiana
taxonomy: Pleurothallis amesiana is a species of orchid in the genus Pleurothallis. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This orchid is a type of epiphyte, meaning it grows on other plants, typically trees, in its natural habitat. The classification of Pleurothallis amesiana is further divided into the subfamily Epidendroideae and the tribe Maxillarieae. It is native to Central America.

This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing stress and improving overall well-being.
